system_logs.message: TrueNAS SCALE initialized. Pool tank + storage online.
All 9 Docker services confirmed RUNNING via Dockge.
Cloudflare tunnel active. 6 domains resolving on gonzotech.us.
Gluetun / NordVPN handshake OK. ARR stack traffic routed securely.
Recyclarr sync complete — Radarr & Sonarr quality profiles up to date.
System monitoring active. All endpoints healthy. NOMINAL.

projects.name: Homelab Foundation
projects.description: Stood up TrueNAS SCALE on a Dell Optiplex 3070 SFF with a dual-pool storage setup (3TB HDD media pool + SSD config pool). All services containerized in Dockge and exposed via Cloudflare Zero Trust tunnels — no open ports required.

projects.name: Media Ecosystem
projects.description: Full media stack deployed: Jellyfin for streaming (Intel QuickSync hardware transcoding, custom GonzoTech CSS branding), and an automated acquisition pipeline using Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, and qBittorrent all routed through NordVPN via Gluetun.

projects.name: Photo & Game Libraries
projects.description: Immich manages self-hosted photo/video backup with SMB external library integration. Romm catalogs 2,300+ ROMs across 19 platforms with full IGDB metadata. Both accessible remotely via dedicated subdomains.

projects.name: Storage Expansion
projects.description: Planning an 8TB HDD addition with data migration from the current 3TB pool. Goal is to extend the media library capacity while maintaining the hardlink-compatible folder structure for efficient storage.

projects.name: Hardware Upgrade
projects.description: The Optiplex 3070 SFF has served well, but a more expandable system is on the horizon — more PCIe slots, additional drive bays, and headroom for future workloads like local AI inference or additional VMs.

automation.name: Media Acquisition Pipeline
automation.description: Sonarr and Radarr monitor RSS feeds and trigger qBittorrent downloads automatically. Prowlarr aggregates all indexers in one place. Completed downloads are moved and renamed without any manual intervention.

automation.name: Quality Profile Sync (Recyclarr)
automation.description: Recyclarr syncs TRaSH Guide quality profiles into Radarr and Sonarr on a schedule — keeping release scoring, custom formats, and quality cutoffs consistently tuned without manual edits.

automation.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Management
automation.description: Cloudflared runs as a Docker container and maintains persistent tunnels for all six public subdomains. No dynamic DNS, no port forwarding — services are exposed securely through Cloudflare's network.

automation.name: Service Monitoring (Uptime Kuma)
automation.description: Uptime Kuma polls all internal and external service endpoints on a regular interval. A public status page at status.gonzotech.us gives a live view of what's up — grouped by service category.
